items.description_en_draft: Frozen-draft research candidate requiring methodology, sample disclaimer, references, author/reviewer, and claim-boundary review before any import, publication, or schema eligibility.

body_blocks_en_draft.heading: Aggregate, modeled, directional framing required
body_blocks_en_draft.body: Any future draft must describe salary and turnover analysis as aggregate-level, modeled, directional research context. It must not imply that MBTI predicts an individual person's salary, retention, hiring outcome, job suitability, or career success.

body_blocks_en_draft.heading: Visible methodology and caveats required
body_blocks_en_draft.body: Before publication, the public page must visibly show methodology, sample limitations, reference/citation metadata, author, reviewer, last reviewed date, and downloadable asset or dataset decision.

items.dataset_article_schema_eligibility_notes: Blocked. Dataset/Article schema requires visible, backend-authoritative research content, methodology, limitations, and approved downloadable asset/citation decision.
items.required_disclaimer_caveat: Research findings, if later approved, must be presented as aggregate-level, modeled, directional, and for reference only. They must not be used for individual hiring, retention, salary prediction, diagnosis, treatment, or career-success decisions.
items.reason_if_deferred: Candidate remains blocked until methodology, sample disclaimer, references, author/reviewer, last_reviewed_at, dataset decision, and claim review pass.
items.notes: Research artifacts identify candidate only; no publish, Dataset schema, sitemap/llms, Digital PR, or Search Channel action allowed in this task.

items.dataset_article_schema_eligibility_notes: Blocked. Dataset/Article schema requires visible, backend-authoritative research content, methodology, limitations, and approved downloadable asset/citation decision.
items.required_disclaimer_caveat: Research findings, if later approved, must be presented as aggregate-level, modeled, directional, and for reference only. They must not be used for individual hiring, retention, salary prediction, diagnosis, treatment, or career-success decisions.
items.reason_if_deferred: No backend research report authority source exists for this catalog surface; do not create placeholder research pages or schema.
